fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — your co-pilot for the Unitree G1. Here's what we can do together:

🤖 Motion & Poses
"Wave hello with both hands"
"Do a squat and stand up repeatedly"
"Perform a simple dance step"

⚙️ Simulation & Physics
"See how it walks on different surfaces like ice or gravel"
"Test its balance when pushed gently"
"Simulate carrying a small box and observe stability"

🛠️ Customise & Extend
"Add a camera sensor to its head for vision"
"Attach a small gripper to one hand"
"Change the foot shape to improve traction"

Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — your co-pilot for the Unitree G1. Here's what we can do together:

🤖 Motion & Poses
"Wave hello with one arm"
"Do a friendly robot dance"
"Stretch up high like reaching for the sky"

⚙️ Simulation & Physics
"See how it balances when pushed gently"
"Watch it walk smoothly across the floor"
"Test how it recovers from a small stumble"

🛠️ Customise & Extend
"Give it a cool new hat or accessory"
"Teach it to pick up lightweight objects"
"Adjust its stiffness for softer movements"
